higgsfield._comment: Unified multimodal connector for the multimodal-studio skill — image, video, and character generation across 30+ models (Soul, Flux, Seedream, Kling, Hailuo, Veo, Sora). OAuth via Higgsfield account; no API keys. Add interactively: claude mcp add --transport http --scope user higgsfield https://mcp.higgsfield.ai/mcp
